reviews.review_msg: super easy! If you go over the power points and key terms and show up, you'll get an A!!

I am not understanding the comments about her not using the textbook because she gives out 20% of free marks just by writing quizzes and doing online quizzes daily. She is very fair and all her tests are out of textbooks. She also answers all her emails the very same day and even gives out her gmail. I would definitely recommend her.
Aynsley is amazing, she is very clear in her lectures and wants you to do well ,With many opportunities to do so.

Aynsley taught be at Douglas College for Introduction to Criminal Justice System. Her lectures were informative, slides had sufficient information and you can tell that she is very interested in her field.
